series.title: 해광그룹 막내아들
series.author: 해광 화물운송
series.summary: 해광그룹 막내아들 박종찬(36). 형들의 음모로 하루아침에 빈털터리! 남은 건 1톤 트럭 한 대와 깡뿐. 화물 현장 밑바닥에서 다시 정상까지, 핸들로 통쾌하게 갚아준다. 웃기고 짜릿한 재벌 재기 활극.
series.poster:
<svg viewBox='0 0 300 400' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'>
<defs>
<linearGradient id='sky' x1='0' y1='0' x2='0' y2='1'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='#0b1733'/><stop offset='55%' stop-color='#21407e'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='#0a1020'/></linearGradient>
<linearGradient id='road' x1='0' y1='0' x2='0' y2='1'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='#3a3f4d'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='#15181f'/></linearGradient>
<linearGradient id='gold' x1='0' y1='0' x2='0' y2='1'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='#ffe79a'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='#d4a017'/></linearGradient>
<radialGradient id='glow' cx='50%' cy='38%' r='60%'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='#3b63b8' stop-opacity='.7'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='#0b1733' stop-opacity='0'/></radialGradient>
</defs>
<rect width='300' height='400' fill='url(#sky)'/>
<rect width='300' height='400' fill='url(#glow)'/>
<!-- 도시 스카이라인 -->
<g fill='#16294f' opacity='.85'>
<rect x='8' y='150' width='34' height='110'/><rect x='48' y='120' width='28' height='140'/><rect x='82' y='160' width='24' height='100'/><rect x='196' y='135' width='30' height='125'/><rect x='232' y='160' width='26' height='100'/><rect x='264' y='145' width='28' height='115'/>
</g>
<g fill='#ffd86b' opacity='.55'>
<rect x='54' y='132' width='5' height='6'/><rect x='64' y='150' width='5' height='6'/><rect x='202' y='150' width='5' height='6'/><rect x='240' y='176' width='5' height='6'/><rect x='270' y='160' width='5' height='6'/>
</g>
<!-- 도로 -->
<polygon points='0,400 0,300 300,300 300,400' fill='url(#road)'/>
<polygon points='150,300 138,400 162,400' fill='#cdd3e0' opacity='.25'/>
<!-- 1톤 트럭 (뒤) -->
<g transform='translate(176,232)'>
<rect x='0' y='14' width='86' height='46' rx='4' fill='#e9edf5'/>
<rect x='-30' y='20' width='34' height='40' rx='5' fill='#1a3a8a'/>
<rect x='-24' y='26' width='22' height='15' rx='2' fill='#9fb6e0'/>
<circle cx='-14' cy='66' r='9' fill='#222'/><circle cx='-14' cy='66' r='4' fill='#666'/>
<circle cx='58' cy='66' r='9' fill='#222'/><circle cx='58' cy='66' r='4' fill='#666'/>
<rect x='6' y='20' width='74' height='12' fill='#1a3a8a' opacity='.9'/>
<text x='42' y='30' font-size='9' fill='#ffd700' font-weight='bold' text-anchor='middle' font-family='sans-serif'>HAEGWANG</text>
</g>
<!-- 주인공 박종찬: 정장 위에 작업점퍼, 결연 -->
<g transform='translate(150,250)'>
<!-- 몸통: 네이비 점퍼 + 골드 트림 -->
<path d='M-40 150 L-40 60 Q-40 36 -16 32 L16 32 Q40 36 40 60 L40 150 Z' fill='#15336f'/>
<path d='M-40 60 L-16 32 L-16 150 L-40 150 Z' fill='#0f2752'/>
<rect x='-3' y='34' width='6' height='116' fill='#d4a017' opacity='.85'/>
<path d='M-16 32 L0 70 L16 32 L8 30 L0 52 L-8 30 Z' fill='#fff'/>
<path d='M-3 34 L3 34 L0 54 Z' fill='#c0392b'/>
<!-- 목/머리 -->
<rect x='-9' y='14' width='18' height='22' rx='5' fill='#e9b486'/>
<circle cx='0' cy='-4' r='26' fill='#f0c39a'/>
<path d='M-26 -8 Q-24 -34 0 -34 Q24 -34 26 -8 Q14 -22 0 -20 Q-14 -22 -26 -8 Z' fill='#241d18'/>
<path d='M-20 -10 Q-22 -26 -4 -26' fill='none' stroke='#241d18' stroke-width='3'/>
<!-- 눈썹/눈 결연 -->
<path d='M-17 -6 q7 -4 13 0' stroke='#241d18' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/>
<path d='M4 -6 q6 -4 13 0' stroke='#241d18' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/>
<circle cx='-10' cy='2' r='3' fill='#1a1a1a'/><circle cx='11' cy='2' r='3' fill='#1a1a1a'/>
<path d='M-6 14 q6 5 12 0' stroke='#9b6a3e' stroke-width='2.5' fill='none'/>
<!-- 작업장갑 낀 손, 트럭 열쇠 -->
<g transform='translate(28,86)'><rect x='-8' y='-8' width='20' height='26' rx='7' fill='#1f2937'/><rect x='10' y='-2' width='5' height='3' fill='#cfcfcf'/><circle cx='20' cy='0' r='6' fill='none' stroke='#cfcfcf' stroke-width='3'/></g>
</g>
<!-- 타이틀 -->
<rect x='0' y='8' width='300' height='2' fill='#d4a017' opacity='.5'/>
<text x='150' y='52' font-size='30' fill='url(#gold)' font-weight='900' text-anchor='middle' font-family='sans-serif' letter-spacing='-1'>해광그룹</text>
<text x='150' y='86' font-size='30' fill='#ffffff' font-weight='900' text-anchor='middle' font-family='sans-serif' letter-spacing='-1'>막내아들</text>
<rect x='70' y='98' width='160' height='24' rx='12' fill='#c0392b'/>
<text x='150' y='115' font-size='13' fill='#fff' font-weight='bold' text-anchor='middle' font-family='sans-serif'>화물 핸들을 잡다</text>
<text x='150' y='384' font-size='11' fill='#cdd7ea' text-anchor='middle' font-family='sans-serif'>몰락한 재벌, 1톤 트럭으로 다시 정상까지</text>
</svg>

episodes.title: 예고편 : 몰락, 그리고 시작
episodes.thumb:
<svg viewBox='0 0 160 160' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'>
<defs><linearGradient id='tg' x1='0' y1='0' x2='0' y2='1'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='#21407e'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='#0b1733'/></linearGradient></defs>
<rect width='160' height='160' fill='url(#tg)'/>
<circle cx='80' cy='66' r='30' fill='#f0c39a'/>
<path d='M50 60 Q52 34 80 34 Q108 34 110 60 Q96 46 80 48 Q64 46 50 60 Z' fill='#241d18'/>
<path d='M66 64 q14 6 28 0' stroke='#9b6a3e' stroke-width='2.5' fill='none'/>
<circle cx='70' cy='62' r='3' fill='#1a1a1a'/><circle cx='90' cy='62' r='3' fill='#1a1a1a'/>
<path d='M62 56 q8 -4 14 0 M84 56 q8 -4 14 0' stroke='#241d18' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/>
<path d='M44 160 L44 120 Q44 104 80 104 Q116 104 116 120 L116 160 Z' fill='#15336f'/>
<rect x='77' y='104' width='6' height='56' fill='#d4a017'/>
<text x='80' y='150' font-size='13' fill='#ffd700' font-weight='bold' text-anchor='middle' font-family='sans-serif'>예고편</text>
</svg>

panels.caption: 📍 컷1. 해광그룹 막내아들 박종찬. 36년 인생, 손에 물 한 방울 안 묻히고 살았다.
panels.svg:
<svg viewBox='0 0 520 300' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'>
<defs><linearGradient id='lux' x1='0' y1='0' x2='0' y2='1'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='#2b2f5c'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='#14152e'/></linearGradient></defs>
<rect width='520' height='300' fill='url(#lux)'/>
<g fill='#3a3f74' opacity='.6'><rect x='30' y='40' width='60' height='200'/><rect x='110' y='20' width='70' height='220'/><rect x='360' y='30' width='64' height='210'/><rect x='440' y='60' width='54' height='180'/></g>
<g fill='#ffe07a' opacity='.5'><rect x='44' y='70' width='8' height='10'/><rect x='130' y='60' width='8' height='10'/><rect x='378' y='80' width='8' height='10'/><rect x='456' y='100' width='8' height='10'/></g>
<!-- 박종찬 정장 -->
<g transform='translate(250,150)'>
<path d='M-46 150 L-46 40 Q-46 18 -18 14 L18 14 Q46 18 46 40 L46 150 Z' fill='#1b1b28'/>
<path d='M-18 14 L0 58 L18 14 L9 11 L0 38 L-9 11 Z' fill='#fff'/>
<path d='M-3 16 L3 16 L0 44 Z' fill='#c0392b'/>
<rect x='-11' y='-8' width='22' height='24' rx='6' fill='#e9b486'/>
<circle cx='0' cy='-28' r='28' fill='#f0c39a'/>
<path d='M-28 -32 Q-26 -60 0 -60 Q26 -60 28 -32 Q14 -48 0 -46 Q-14 -48 -28 -32 Z' fill='#241d18'/>
<path d='M-18 -32 q8 -4 14 0 M4 -32 q8 -4 14 0' stroke='#241d18' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/>
<circle cx='-10' cy='-24' r='3' fill='#1a1a1a'/><circle cx='11' cy='-24' r='3' fill='#1a1a1a'/>
<path d='M-7 -12 q7 5 14 0' stroke='#9b6a3e' stroke-width='2.5' fill='none'/>
<!-- 샴페인 잔 -->
<g transform='translate(40,40)'><path d='M0 0 l10 0 l-2 14 l-6 0 z' fill='#ffe9a8' opacity='.9'/><rect x='3' y='14' width='4' height='14' fill='#cfcfcf'/><ellipse cx='5' cy='30' rx='9' ry='3' fill='#cfcfcf'/></g>
</g>
<rect x='300' y='40' width='190' height='70' rx='16' fill='#fff'/><polygon points='320,106 300,132 348,108' fill='#fff'/>
<text x='318' y='70' font-size='16' fill='#222' font-weight='bold' font-family='sans-serif'>인생 참… 쉽네.</text>
<text x='318' y='94' font-size='14' fill='#555' font-family='sans-serif'>돈이 일을 하니까.</text>
</svg>

panels.caption: 📍 컷2. 그러던 어느 날, 형들의 음모. 도장 하나에 모든 게 무너졌다.
panels.svg:
<svg viewBox='0 0 520 300' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'>
<rect width='520' height='300' fill='#1d1622'/>
<rect width='520' height='300' fill='#000' opacity='.15'/>
<!-- 그림자 형들 -->
<g fill='#0c0810'>
<path d='M40 300 L40 150 Q40 120 90 120 Q140 120 140 150 L140 300 Z'/><circle cx='90' cy='110' r='30'/>
<path d='M150 300 L150 160 Q150 134 196 134 Q242 134 242 160 L242 300 Z'/><circle cx='196' cy='126' r='27'/>
</g>
<g fill='#c0392b'><circle cx='80' cy='106' r='3'/><circle cx='100' cy='106' r='3'/><circle cx='187' cy='122' r='3'/><circle cx='205' cy='122' r='3'/></g>
<path d='M74 120 q16 8 32 0' stroke='#7a1f1f' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/>
<!-- 서류 + 도장 쾅 -->
<g transform='translate(360,170) rotate(-6)'>
<rect x='0' y='0' width='130' height='90' rx='4' fill='#f3efe2'/>
<rect x='12' y='14' width='106' height='6' fill='#cfc7b0'/><rect x='12' y='30' width='90' height='6' fill='#cfc7b0'/><rect x='12' y='46' width='100' height='6' fill='#cfc7b0'/>
<text x='14' y='80' font-size='12' fill='#b00020' font-weight='bold' font-family='sans-serif'>경영권 양도</text>
<circle cx='96' cy='66' r='20' fill='none' stroke='#c0392b' stroke-width='4'/><text x='96' y='71' font-size='11' fill='#c0392b' font-weight='bold' text-anchor='middle' font-family='sans-serif'>승인</text>
</g>
<text x='300' y='60' font-size='40' fill='#c0392b' font-weight='900' font-family='sans-serif' transform='rotate(-8 300 60)'>쾅!</text>
<rect x='250' y='90' width='250' height='56' rx='14' fill='#fff'/><polygon points='270,140 252,166 300,142' fill='#fff'/>
<text x='266' y='114' font-size='15' fill='#222' font-weight='bold' font-family='sans-serif'>막내야, 넌 이제</text>
<text x='266' y='134' font-size='15' fill='#c0392b' font-weight='bold' font-family='sans-serif'>해광이랑 상관없다.</text>
</svg>

panels.caption: 📍 컷3. 하루아침에 빈털터리. 통장 잔고… 0원. (어, 진짜 0원이네?)
panels.svg:
<svg viewBox='0 0 520 300' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'>
<defs><linearGradient id='rain' x1='0' y1='0' x2='0' y2='1'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='#3a4660'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='#1c2334'/></linearGradient></defs>
<rect width='520' height='300' fill='url(#rain)'/>
<g stroke='#9fb0cf' stroke-width='2' opacity='.4'><line x1='40' y1='0' x2='28' y2='40'/><line x1='120' y1='0' x2='108' y2='40'/><line x1='220' y1='10' x2='208' y2='50'/><line x1='320' y1='0' x2='308' y2='40'/><line x1='430' y1='10' x2='418' y2='50'/><line x1='480' y1='0' x2='468' y2='40'/></g>
<!-- 박종찬, 젖은 정장 풀죽음 -->
<g transform='translate(150,160)'>
<path d='M-40 140 L-40 44 Q-40 24 -14 20 L14 20 Q40 24 40 44 L40 140 Z' fill='#23232f'/>
<rect x='-10' y='0' width='20' height='22' rx='6' fill='#dca77a'/>
<circle cx='0' cy='-20' r='26' fill='#e3b78c'/>
<path d='M-26 -24 Q-24 -50 0 -50 Q24 -50 26 -24 Q14 -38 0 -36 Q-14 -38 -26 -24 Z' fill='#1f1813'/>
<path d='M-16 -18 q7 3 13 5 M3 -13 q7 -3 14 -5' stroke='#1f1813' stroke-width='2.5' fill='none'/>
<circle cx='-9' cy='-16' r='2.5' fill='#1a1a1a'/><circle cx='10' cy='-14' r='2.5' fill='#1a1a1a'/>
<path d='M-6 -2 q6 -3 12 0' stroke='#9b6a3e' stroke-width='2.5' fill='none'/>
<path d='M0 -50 q-4 14 -10 26' stroke='#3a3a4a' stroke-width='3' fill='none' opacity='.5'/>
</g>
<!-- 폰: 잔고 0원 -->
<g transform='translate(330,120)'>
<rect x='0' y='0' width='110' height='160' rx='16' fill='#111'/><rect x='8' y='16' width='94' height='128' rx='4' fill='#fff'/>
<rect x='16' y='26' width='78' height='30' rx='6' fill='#03C75A'/><text x='24' y='46' font-size='11' fill='#fff' font-weight='bold' font-family='sans-serif'>해광은행 잔고</text>
<text x='55' y='100' font-size='30' fill='#c0392b' font-weight='900' text-anchor='middle' font-family='sans-serif'>0원</text>
<text x='55' y='124' font-size='11' fill='#888' text-anchor='middle' font-family='sans-serif'>(영원)</text>
</g>
<rect x='40' y='30' width='160' height='52' rx='14' fill='#fff'/><polygon points='60,76 44,100 92,78' fill='#fff'/>
<text x='56' y='54' font-size='15' fill='#222' font-weight='bold' font-family='sans-serif'>어? 0원이…</text>
<text x='56' y='73' font-size='15' fill='#222' font-weight='bold' font-family='sans-serif'>진짜 0원이네?!</text>
</svg>

panels.caption: 📍 컷4. 남은 건 아버지가 남긴 1톤 트럭 한 대. “까짓거, 몸으로 때우지!”
panels.svg:
<svg viewBox='0 0 520 300' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'>
<defs><linearGradient id='gar' x1='0' y1='0' x2='0' y2='1'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='#d9e2f0'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='#aeb9cc'/></linearGradient></defs>
<rect width='520' height='300' fill='url(#gar)'/>
<rect y='220' width='520' height='80' fill='#8b94a6'/>
<!-- 1톤 트럭 -->
<g transform='translate(250,120)'>
<rect x='0' y='30' width='150' height='80' rx='6' fill='#eef1f7'/><rect x='6' y='36' width='138' height='20' fill='#1a3a8a'/>
<text x='75' y='51' font-size='13' fill='#ffd700' font-weight='bold' text-anchor='middle' font-family='sans-serif'>해광 화물</text>
<rect x='-54' y='40' width='58' height='70' rx='8' fill='#1a3a8a'/><rect x='-46' y='50' width='40' height='26' rx='3' fill='#bcd0f0'/>
<circle cx='-30' cy='118' r='15' fill='#222'/><circle cx='-30' cy='118' r='6' fill='#777'/>
<circle cx='110' cy='118' r='15' fill='#222'/><circle cx='110' cy='118' r='6' fill='#777'/>
<!-- 운전석 박종찬 -->
<circle cx='-26' cy='62' r='15' fill='#f0c39a'/><path d='M-40 58 Q-39 44 -26 44 Q-13 44 -12 58 Q-20 50 -26 51 Q-33 50 -40 58 Z' fill='#241d18'/>
<circle cx='-30' cy='61' r='2' fill='#111'/><circle cx='-22' cy='61' r='2' fill='#111'/>
<path d='M-31 68 q5 4 10 0' stroke='#9b6a3e' stroke-width='2' fill='none'/>
</g>
<!-- 부릉 + 상자 와르르 코믹 -->
<text x='40' y='150' font-size='30' fill='#1a3a8a' font-weight='900' font-family='sans-serif'>부릉~!</text>
<g transform='translate(360,206)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='32' height='28' fill='#c69b6b'/><rect x='28' y='-20' width='28' height='26' fill='#d6ab78' transform='rotate(12 42 -7)'/><rect x='-10' y='-16' width='24' height='22' fill='#b88a55' transform='rotate(-14 2 -5)'/><text x='34' y='-30' font-size='16' fill='#c0392b' font-weight='bold' font-family='sans-serif'>우당탕!</text></g>
<rect x='150' y='28' width='210' height='52' rx='14' fill='#FFD700'/><polygon points='180,74 168,98 210,76' fill='#FFD700'/>
<text x='168' y='52' font-size='15' fill='#1a237e' font-weight='bold' font-family='sans-serif'>까짓거, 몸으로</text>
<text x='168' y='71' font-size='15' fill='#1a237e' font-weight='bold' font-family='sans-serif'>때우면 되잖아!</text>
</svg>

panels.caption: 📍 컷5. 땀에 젖은 첫 운임. 재벌 땐 몰랐던 무게. — 이게… 내가 번 돈이다.
panels.svg:
<svg viewBox='0 0 520 300' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'>
<defs><linearGradient id='dawn' x1='0' y1='0' x2='0' y2='1'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='#ffb86b'/><stop offset='60%' stop-color='#ffd9a0'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='#fff1d8'/></linearGradient></defs>
<rect width='520' height='300' fill='url(#dawn)'/>
<circle cx='420' cy='90' r='50' fill='#fff6df' opacity='.85'/>
<!-- 박종찬 작업점퍼, 결연한 눈빛 + 땀 -->
<g transform='translate(180,160)'>
<path d='M-44 140 L-44 36 Q-44 16 -16 12 L16 12 Q44 16 44 36 L44 140 Z' fill='#15336f'/>
<rect x='-3' y='14' width='6' height='126' fill='#d4a017'/>
<path d='M-16 12 L0 50 L16 12 L8 10 L0 34 L-8 10 Z' fill='#dfe7f5'/>
<rect x='-10' y='-8' width='20' height='22' rx='6' fill='#e9b486'/>
<circle cx='0' cy='-28' r='27' fill='#f0c39a'/>
<path d='M-27 -32 Q-25 -58 0 -58 Q25 -58 27 -32 Q14 -46 0 -44 Q-14 -46 -27 -32 Z' fill='#241d18'/>
<path d='M-17 -30 q8 -3 14 1 M3 -29 q8 -4 14 0' stroke='#241d18' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/>
<circle cx='-10' cy='-22' r='3.2' fill='#1a1a1a'/><circle cx='11' cy='-22' r='3.2' fill='#1a1a1a'/>
<circle cx='-9' cy='-23' r='1' fill='#fff'/><circle cx='12' cy='-23' r='1' fill='#fff'/>
<path d='M-7 -10 q7 4 14 0' stroke='#9b6a3e' stroke-width='2.5' fill='none'/>
<path d='M20 -40 q3 8 1 16' stroke='#bcd6ff' stroke-width='2.5' fill='none' opacity='.8'/>
</g>
<!-- 폰: 정산 입금 -->
<g transform='translate(330,110)'>
<rect x='0' y='0' width='120' height='150' rx='16' fill='#1c1c1c'/><rect x='8' y='14' width='104' height='122' rx='4' fill='#fff'/>
<rect x='16' y='26' width='88' height='34' rx='7' fill='#03C75A'/><text x='24' y='48' font-size='12' fill='#fff' font-weight='bold' font-family='sans-serif'>입금 알림</text>
<text x='60' y='96' font-size='20' fill='#1a3a8a' font-weight='900' text-anchor='middle' font-family='sans-serif'>+ 운임</text>
<text x='60' y='120' font-size='12' fill='#555' text-anchor='middle' font-family='sans-serif'>첫 정산 완료</text>
</g>
<rect x='30' y='34' width='180' height='52' rx='14' fill='#fff'/><polygon points='60,80 46,104 92,82' fill='#fff'/>
<text x='46' y='58' font-size='14' fill='#222' font-weight='bold' font-family='sans-serif'>이게… 내가</text>
<text x='46' y='77' font-size='14' fill='#c0392b' font-weight='bold' font-family='sans-serif'>직접 번 돈이다.</text>
</svg>

panels.caption: 📍 컷6. “형들… 기다려. 이 핸들로, 해광을 다시 내 손에.” — 막내아들의 반격이 시작된다!
panels.svg:
<svg viewBox='0 0 520 300' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'>
<defs><radialGradient id='spot' cx='50%' cy='40%' r='70%'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='#26315c'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='#0a0e1c'/></radialGradient></defs>
<rect width='520' height='300' fill='url(#spot)'/>
<g stroke='#39477e' stroke-width='2' opacity='.5'>
<line x1='260' y1='150' x2='40' y2='10'/><line x1='260' y1='150' x2='480' y2='10'/><line x1='260' y1='150' x2='10' y2='150'/><line x1='260' y1='150' x2='510' y2='150'/><line x1='260' y1='150' x2='60' y2='290'/><line x1='260' y1='150' x2='460' y2='290'/></g>
<!-- 박종찬 클로즈업 (반측면, 결의) -->
<g transform='translate(170,170)'>
<path d='M-50 130 L-50 30 Q-50 6 -18 2 L20 2 Q52 6 52 30 L52 130 Z' fill='#13315f'/>
<rect x='-3' y='6' width='6' height='124' fill='#d4a017'/>
<rect x='-12' y='-14' width='24' height='24' rx='6' fill='#e9b486'/>
<circle cx='0' cy='-36' r='30' fill='#f0c39a'/>
<path d='M-30 -40 Q-28 -68 0 -68 Q28 -68 30 -40 Q15 -56 0 -54 Q-15 -56 -30 -40 Z' fill='#241d18'/>
<path d='M-19 -40 q9 -5 15 0 M4 -40 q9 -5 15 0' stroke='#241d18' stroke-width='3.5' fill='none'/>
<circle cx='-11' cy='-31' r='3.4' fill='#1a1a1a'/><circle cx='12' cy='-31' r='3.4' fill='#1a1a1a'/>
<circle cx='-10' cy='-32' r='1.1' fill='#fff'/><circle cx='13' cy='-32' r='1.1' fill='#fff'/>
<path d='M-8 -18 q8 4 16 0' stroke='#8a5d34' stroke-width='2.5' fill='none'/>
</g>
<rect x='250' y='40' width='250' height='86' rx='16' fill='#fff'/><polygon points='268,120 246,150 300,122' fill='#fff'/>
<text x='266' y='70' font-size='15' fill='#222' font-weight='bold' font-family='sans-serif'>형들… 기다려.</text>
<text x='266' y='94' font-size='15' fill='#222' font-weight='bold' font-family='sans-serif'>이 핸들로,</text>
<text x='266' y='116' font-size='16' fill='#c0392b' font-weight='900' font-family='sans-serif'>해광을 다시 내 손에.</text>
<rect x='250' y='196' width='250' height='78' rx='16' fill='#FFD700'/>
<text x='268' y='224' font-size='13' fill='#1a237e' font-weight='bold' font-family='sans-serif'>다음 화에 계속!</text>
<text x='268' y='246' font-size='12.5' fill='#1a237e' font-family='sans-serif'>당신의 재기도 여기서 —</text>
<text x='268' y='266' font-size='13' fill='#1a237e' font-weight='bold' font-family='sans-serif'>화물구인구직 해광 ☎010-7233-3916</text>
</svg>
